utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well that was depressing , I think I just bought a soft pretzel from one of the kids from Fame .

emotion_cause.span: 1_that was depressing , I think I just bought a soft pretzel from one of the kids from Fame .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Um ... hmm . Oh wait ! This is Bonnie .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: This is Bonnie ? This is Bonnie ? You are Bonnie ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_This is Bonnie ? This is Bonnie ? You are Bonnie ?

utterances.speaker: Bonnie
utterances.text: I can show you an ID if you want ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh no , I am sorry , you look a lot different from the last time I ... I saw you .

emotion_cause.span: 6_you look a lot different from the last time I ... I saw you .

utterances.speaker: Bonnie
utterances.text: Oh yeah , well I just started wearing bras again .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well I hope you have fun tonight .
